--- Thread (1 messages, 2018-03-01) ---
[2018-03-01 21:31] mrguy888: Odin is op. Gmech and Drake are pressure units in the same tech. Pressure multiplies in value as you get more so first Odin with either of those two unit can snowball the opponent out of the game more often than not. Manticore and Lancetooth also make first Odin unreasonably strong.

[2018-03-02 00:03] http404error: so they get spells like those instead
[2018-03-02 00:03] liadahlia (Lia): it's cancerous because it's very annoying to play against
[2018-03-02 00:03] liadahlia (Lia): creates bad gameplay, is all
[2018-03-02 00:03] http404error: It can be annoying, sometimes
[2018-03-02 00:03] steel0229e (Steel): UTH was literal cancer
[2018-03-02 00:03] steel0229e (Steel): and it took them many years to nerf it
[2018-03-02 00:05] liadahlia (Lia): in gwent, there's the ambush cards
[2018-03-02 00:05] liadahlia (Lia): ambush cards are face down cards so you don't know what they are, and they flip over on certain conditions
[2018-03-02 00:05] steel0229e (Steel): so they are the equivalent of secrets
[2018-03-02 00:05] liadahlia (Lia): at one point there is an ambush card that can deal damage to a card played and prevent its actions
[2018-03-02 00:05] steel0229e (Steel): how are they called in yu-gi-oh? trap cards?
[2018-03-02 00:06] liadahlia (Lia): although trap cards you can choose when you want to activate it
[2018-03-02 00:06] http404error: secrets are fun though :<
[2018-03-02 00:06] liadahlia (Lia): ambush are definitely more like secrets
[2018-03-02 00:06] http404error: I think they're a good use of digital design space
[2018-03-02 00:06] liadahlia (Lia): anyways the reason it's cancerous is because it's a card that you just do not want to play into
[2018-03-02 00:07] liadahlia (Lia): especially when it's run alongside another ambush card that punishes you for not playing a card
[2018-03-02 00:07] liadahlia (Lia): so you get into a 50/50 situation
[2018-03-02 00:07] steel0229e (Steel): do they damage a specific card or any card you play next?
[2018-03-02 00:07] liadahlia (Lia): the specific card you play next
[2018-03-02 00:07] liadahlia (Lia): and prevent its "battlecry"
[2018-03-02 00:07] liadahlia (Lia): so you want to play around it by playing a big card that doesn't get killed right away
[2018-03-02 00:07] liadahlia (Lia): but sometimes you don't have that option
[2018-03-02 00:07] liadahlia (Lia): so your other option is to pass the turn
[2018-03-02 00:07] http404error: You have a very liberal definition of cancer.
[2018-03-02 00:08] liadahlia (Lia): but then there's another card that punishes you for passing the turn
[2018-03-02 00:08] http404error: I can understand why you would dislike the design decisions made in other card games
[2018-03-02 00:08] http404error: But I don't think they're objectively wrong
[2018-03-02 00:08] liadahlia (Lia): my definition of cancerous is if the community hates it
[2018-03-02 00:08] liadahlia (Lia): i think that's reasonable enough
[2018-03-02 00:08] http404error: That's a very difficult thing to measure adequately
[2018-03-02 00:08] http404error: The article does talk about that though
[2018-03-02 00:09] http404error: I think many players also love each of the things that many complain about
[2018-03-02 00:09] liadahlia (Lia): i think for just a quick judgement the community's reaction to a card can be enough
[2018-03-02 00:09] steel0229e (Steel): sure if you are hunter you wont complain 😄
[2018-03-02 00:09] liadahlia (Lia): because after all, the community's "fun" is kinda what you're aiming for
[2018-03-02 00:10] http404error: Many things like that are polarized rather than universally panned though
[2018-03-02 00:10] http404error: Like uh, snipers in Prismata
[2018-03-02 00:10] http404error: Buncha players hate them
[2018-03-02 00:10] liadahlia (Lia): as in stream snipers?
[2018-03-02 00:10] http404error: Well, a bunch of players love them too, and they make interesting decisions
[2018-03-02 00:10] http404error: No, I mean like Apollo and Deadeye
[2018-03-02 00:11] steel0229e (Steel): yeah snipers are very polarising
[2018-03-02 00:11] http404error: Shiver Yeti is not a sniper
[2018-03-02 00:11] http404error: The green satellite is though
[2018-03-02 00:11] liadahlia (Lia): yes KD is very frustrating to play against imo
[2018-03-02 00:11] http404error: I love it, personally
[2018-03-02 00:11] liadahlia (Lia): i don't think apollo is frustrating to play against though
[2018-03-02 00:11] http404error: Apollo is necessarily a little weak and niche
[2018-03-02 00:11] liadahlia (Lia): it's very easy to figure out which unit apollo will snipe

[2018-03-02 00:12] liadahlia (Lia): i love apollo though
[2018-03-02 00:12] steel0229e (Steel): the kinetic snipe ability is often too weak to be worth it so it is rather just a cheaper green attacker
[2018-03-02 00:12] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): SYeti is a Chill sniper.
[2018-03-02 00:12] http404error: That is not what I mean by sniping
[2018-03-02 00:13] gryph3155 (Gryph202): You  know that feeling you get in your throat when you're in an airplane, and you hit turbulence, and you momentarily go into freefall as if you're in a vomit comet?
[2018-03-02 00:13] steel0229e (Steel): chill and snipe are different mechanics
[2018-03-02 00:13] gryph3155 (Gryph202): That's how I feel when I see Apollo.  😕
[2018-03-02 00:13] liadahlia (Lia): sniping = killing a specific unit outright
[2018-03-02 00:13] steel0229e (Steel): nivo charge/tatsu nullifier are not called snipers for the same reason
[2018-03-02 00:13] liadahlia (Lia): yeah chill doesn't "kill"
[2018-03-02 00:13] liadahlia (Lia): i love using apollos though
[2018-03-02 00:13] liadahlia (Lia): i feel so OP even though I know apollos aren't even that OP
[2018-03-02 00:14] liadahlia (Lia): i feel like i'm getting so much values even though most of the time they're sniping splitters or conduits which is almost the same as having 3 attacks
[2018-03-02 00:14] http404error: But it can feel cancerous to other players
[2018-03-02 00:14] steel0229e (Steel): it is a great feling to limit the opponent
[2018-03-02 00:15] http404error: Anyways, that was my only point
[2018-03-02 00:15] steel0229e (Steel): similarly it is great to prevent/punish a strategy your opponent wants to do
[2018-03-02 00:15] liadahlia (Lia): apollo do completely block off a certain unit sometimes
[2018-03-02 00:15] liadahlia (Lia): and that is a little frustrating
[2018-03-02 00:15] liadahlia (Lia): but i think that's just part of the game
[2018-03-02 00:15] http404error: Oftentimes, generally lukewarm strategies/units/games are less successful than polarizing ones
[2018-03-02 00:15] liadahlia (Lia): a lot of unit blocks other units
[2018-03-02 00:16] http404error: But you're right that things which break Shalev's rule blatantly tend to be also things which create the most negative player experiences
[2018-03-02 00:16] http404error: I think Kinetic Driver is more often used to prevent the opponent from Walling, actually
[2018-03-02 00:17] http404error: Even if it's not used you can threaten a breach, forcing your opponent to build extra tech
[2018-03-02 00:17] http404error: Especially in combination with other "threat" units
[2018-03-02 00:17] wiwiweb: the way I use KD the most is to go "oh shit I didn't realize he was going for <insert legendary unit>, I should have sniped it"
[2018-03-02 00:18] http404error: That's also a good use
[2018-03-02 00:18] elyot: IMO kinetic snipe is super undervalued
[2018-03-02 00:19] steel0229e (Steel): the best way by far is to prevent Arka/delay a big purchase by a turn
[2018-03-02 00:19] steel0229e (Steel): the snipe value is very underwhelming
[2018-03-02 00:19] http404error: I feel like forcing your opponent to roll gold over because you messed up their turn's build is very strong
[2018-03-02 00:20] steel0229e (Steel): maybe it is a little underrated but I am confident it is more on the weak side that's why in high level games snipe happens way less frequently than in lower rated games
[2018-03-02 00:20] elyot: kinetic snipe on its final turn is obviously good, and doing it early costs 1 damage next turn and a bit of "paying early" but deprives opponent of B or RR which can cause a large amount of inefficiency if their build is weak to it
[2018-03-02 00:20] steel0229e (Steel): not if they have excess green
[2018-03-02 00:20] elyot: often people play around it and it's not that good, or they have green they could spend instead, or they can switch to a more expensive unit
[2018-03-02 00:21] steel0229e (Steel): also if they just hold back a splitter then it is already bad for you because you payed a damage + 5G
[2018-03-02 00:21] elyot: but when it's good, it's really good
[2018-03-02 00:21] http404error: I don't see the relevance of holding back a splitter
[2018-03-02 00:21] steel0229e (Steel): you pay a damage->they pay a damage
[2018-03-02 00:21] steel0229e (Steel): and you payed extra resources
[2018-03-02 00:22] http404error: Yeah, I don't see what effect that has on sniping their tech building
[2018-03-02 00:22] http404error: And whether it's good
[2018-03-02 00:22] steel0229e (Steel): since they cant wall they might have to hold dmg
[2018-03-02 00:23] steel0229e (Steel): I did the maths once and a kinetic that snipes conduit was worse than gauss cannon afaik
[2018-03-02 00:23] http404error: Yeah, I can't see sniping conduit being very good
[2018-03-02 00:23] mrguy888: A solid early Kinetic snipe to deny Antima: rW2qP-Mio6L
[2018-03-02 00:24] mrguy888: A replay code. You put it into the game to watch a replay of a game.
[2018-03-02 00:25] steel0229e (Steel): or you can paste it to play.prismata.net/?r=replaycode
[2018-03-02 00:25] steel0229e (Steel): you dont even need a game access code to watch replays online

[2018-03-02 06:27] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): I usually can come up with a strategy, even if it's not the best one, but I really didn't know at all
[2018-03-02 06:27] punf: like if p2 just promises to play dd/ddc/ddc/ddb/1
[2018-03-02 06:28] punf: err that 1 should be a 12 obviously (2 = vivid)
[2018-03-02 06:29] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): What's your thought process of thinking "thunderhead rush"
[2018-03-02 06:30] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): big freeze and big wall with no other attackers = thunderhead?
[2018-03-02 06:30] punf: my thought is that thunderhead is op bullshit
[2018-03-02 06:30] punf: and nothing else in the set is op bullshit
[2018-03-02 06:31] string3807 (String): There might be a Vai tatsu line that beats that right?
[2018-03-02 06:31] punf: if they try to vai/tatsu then you just do anything and beat them, because its bad
[2018-03-02 06:31] punf: i mean theres a motherfucking thurnax in the set
[2018-03-02 06:31] punf: so if you AA before thead then LUL 7 DAMAGE MOTHERFUCKER
[2018-03-02 06:31] mqp: punf are you kidding? just get matrix and oxides and wait out the thunderhead
[2018-03-02 06:32] mqp: i thought you promised to play dd/ddc/ddc/ddb/1, you are going to transition to double animus next turn?
[2018-03-02 06:32] punf: i promise to play my line assuming you dont do anything total bullshit (like 1. A)
[2018-03-02 06:32] mqp: your thunderhead is shit, you can't waste a billion resources on nothing and still win just because you bought tatsus, i will buy some splitters or something and laugh at you
[2018-03-02 06:32] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): oooh i want to watch
[2018-03-02 06:32] punf: wait, one more exception
[2018-03-02 06:33] punf: if you go for a 4+ engi build then i reserve the right to delay thead
[2018-03-02 06:33] mqp: sure i will just play DDB in fact because i think committing to third engi is losing and uninteresting in general (even if it is beating your line)
[2018-03-02 06:34] punf: i have put into the set all the units i care about
[2018-03-02 06:34] punf: you are welcome to put in other units from the set if you wish
[2018-03-02 06:35] mqp: i forgot vivid was here
[2018-03-02 06:37] punf: honestly i feel like my line is really suboptimal against yours
[2018-03-02 06:37] punf: i might lose. if so, bags an rm and im not forced to play this regardless of what you do

[2018-03-02 06:38] punf: i mean im not super sure, but im sure enough that i think its worth testing
[2018-03-02 06:39] mqp: ok this is funny so i try
[2018-03-02 06:39] mqp: i doubt it's really any good
